title: Supreme Court Collegium recommends Preeta Aravindan, Liz Mathew for appointment as Kerala High Court judges
description: The Supreme Court Collegium has recommended the appointment of two lawyers as judges of Kerala High Court. The two lawyers recommended are:- Preeta Aravindan Krishnamma; - Liz Mathew Anthraper.Liz MathewThe decision was taken at a meeting of the Collegium held on April 14. Mathew is a graduate of National Law School of India University, Bengaluru and practices at the Supreme Court.She has worked as a junior to former Supreme Court Justice Indu Malhotra and former Attorney General KK Venugopal.In
